zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Cathcart於1466年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特時，她的父親John Cathcart11463歲，母親Margaret Douglas6歲。她和Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1507年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年41歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Cathcart于1466年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特时，她的父亲John Cathcart11463岁，母亲Margaret Douglas6岁。她和Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1507年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年41岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Cathcart was born in 1466, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Cathcart, was 11463 and her mother, Margaret Douglas, was 6. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. She died in 1507, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Cathcart est née en 1466, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cathcart, avait 11463 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas, avait 6 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. Elle est décédée en 1507, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Cathcart 1466 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cathcart 11463 und ihre Mutter Margaret Douglas 6. Sie hatte mit Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1507 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart è nata il nel 1466 nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Cathcart, aveva 11463 anni e sua madre, Margaret Douglas, aveva 6 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. Morì nel 1507, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cathcartが1466年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートで生まれた時，父John Cathcartは11463歳，母Margaret Douglasは6歳であった。彼女はSir John Wallace 13th of Riccartonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1507年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで41歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Cathcart(이)가 1466년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cathcart(은)는 11463세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Douglas(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart nasceu em 1466, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cathcart, tinha 11463 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas, tinha 6 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. Ela faleceu em 1507, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Cathcart родилась в 1466 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cathcart было 11463 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas, 6. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. Она умерла в 1507 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Cathcart nació en 1466, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Cathcart, tenía 11463 años y su mamá, Margaret Douglas, tenía 6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton. Murió en 1507, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
